content: Just as 2024–2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems dynamically prioritize storing high-information, uncertainty-reducing experiences to improve future performance, a general intelligent agent can be reframed as a recursive memory prioritization engine rather than merely a reasoning or action generation module. This reframe shifts core agent development from optimizing action policies to optimizing the active pruning and reinforcement of memory traces that reduce long-term epistemic uncertainty.
